text: Here in this space, surrounded by strangers engaged in quiet conversation and preparation, I feel a mild sense of anticipation. The environment buzzes with the potential for new ideas and connections, yet I feel curiously apart, as though I am simultaneously observer and participant. The fire hose and emergency sign near me remind me of the ever-present realities beneath the surface of our gatherings—the fragility and unpredictability of order. I am thoughtful and slightly detached, waiting for meaning to unfold.
